---
name: Clinical content review
about: Suggest improvements or clarifications to clinical content
title: "[Clinical review]: "
labels: enhancement
---

**Tool affected**

Name and acronym of the tool whose description, variables or interpretation you want to improve.

**Current content**

Summarise the existing description or logic as currently implemented or documented.

**Suggested change**

Describe your proposed update or clarification.

**Rationale**

Provide reasoning or clinical evidence supporting the change.

**References**

List supporting literature (DOI, PubMed ID) or official guidelines.

**Additional context**

Add any extra information, such as regional practices or patient populations that may be affected.
